content:
God of Slaughter

Chapter 1552: The Title of God of Slaughter!

Translator:

Sigma_

Editor:

SSins

Empty Land.

Inside a majestic, old city in Empty Land, the leading experts of the Soul Clan, Devouring Clan, Black Demon Clan, and Ancient Monster Clan were gathering.

Serene Prison of Soul Clan, Edgar of Devouring Clan, Rupert of Black Demon Clan, and Beverly of Ancient Monster Clan were the four of the Ten Great Territory Ancestors. In this infinite universe, they were the peerless, famous experts. With just a stomp, they could shake an entire star area.

At this moment, they were taking their apprentices and experts in their forces to Ancient Monster Clan’s city. They were discussing the missing case of Neptune and the others.

Neptune, Keith, Labitte, and Oliver were at First Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm, the members of their clans ranked right after them.

Neptune and the others went missing after they came to Wavy River Star Area to chase after Shi Yan, Zi Yao and Yuan Zu.

After that battle, the territory barrier of Wavy River Star Area was torn. The entire territory was shaken. At the same time, they got no information about Shi Yan, Zi Yao, and Yuan Zu. Everybody was amazed and tried to guess the details of that battle.

“Sauron is about to arrive at Empty Land. He invited us to go to the Absolute Beginning Gateway. The Power Upanishad Symbol Tower in Shi Yan’s hands is the key to opening the gateway. As long as we get the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower, I’m sure we can open the Absolute Beginning Gateway.”

Beverly of the Ancient Monster Clan was still mesmerizing. However, her eyes looked very cold. “It’s unbelievable that he has the Absolute Beginning blood and refined the Absolute Beginning body. He’s tougher to deal with now. I don’t know where he’s hiding. It’s not easy to find him.”

“After a while, Montecie and Hiro will come. I’m sure that they know Shi Yan’s location. We will ask them then.” Serene Prison smiled, his face relaxed.

“Would they tell us the truth?” snorted Edgar.

“Opening the Absolute Beginning Gateway benefits everyone. Montecie and Hiro aren’t exceptions. They would at least invite Shi Yan to go with them,” replied Serene Prison with a smile. “I know that Sauron has promoted something so Shi Yan could get the Absolute Beginning body. Don’t worry. He definitely has a plan.”

Mentioning Sauron, the experts looked unnatural. Sauron was at Third Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm. With a human body, it was really thrilling to know he could cultivate to such a level. It puzzled and somehow humiliated the ones who deemed themselves as the high-echelon races.

Sauron had initiated the Absolute Beginning Gateway thing. They had just followed him passively, which made the self-important experts like them feel awkward.

Swoosh!

A water current congregated right amid the four experts. As people were so surprised, the water current slowly shaped Yuan Zu’s body. This body was somehow between real and an illusion, which was like a bubble in the water that would break when someone touched it.

Seeing Yuan Zu’s body materialize, the others screamed, “Precursor Yuan Zu?”

Precursor Yuan Zu, what happened in the battle in Wavy River Star Area?” Serene Prison pulled himself together first. He pondered and then asked, his face stern.

Yuan Zu’s clone became clearer. He wore a tender, hypocritical face and sighed, “I can’t explain briefly. I can’t believe that Shi Yan has become so brutal. He joined hands with an Absolute Beginning creature and killed almost all the experts there. Neptune, Keith, Oliver, Labitte, Xiao Lie, and Jia Na... I’m afraid they couldn’t escape death.”

He pulled a sorrowful face, “I tried my best to stop them. Unfortunately, Hui is so powerful. Shi Yan’s power had increased frantically. I don’t know why. Moreover, Forefather Dragon Lizard was with them. I couldn’t resist the three of them and protect Neptune and the others at the same time. I had to run away.”

Yuan Zu, the main character of that battle, had appeared after a long time. He had distorted the truth and made up the details of the battle.

Serene Prison, Edgar, and the others shook their heads hard, their faces disbelieving.

Neptune, Keith, Oliver, and Labitte were all experts at First Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm. Shi Yan killed them all. It had ignited aflame of anger in them in just a split second.

Those four were elite warriors, the foundation and pillars of their clans. Their deaths were a great loss to their clans, which had reduced their focus massively. Shi Yan had challenged the four clans that were the real overlords of this sea of stars.

“Precursor Yuan Zu, are you sure that they were all dead?” Rupert asked in a low-pitched realm, his eyes sparkling with brutal light. He looked like a beast that was about to lose control.

“After Shi Yan reached the Territory Ancestor Realm, he needed a lot of energy to refill his God power. With the Devouring power Upanishad, he could do it quickly. To him, only the Territory Ancestors could help him increase his energy fast. He came to Empty Land and attacked Ferrell just to accumulate energy...”

Yuan Zu scanned through the crowd. He had thrown every sin on Shi Yan. He wanted to ignite the flame of anger from the four classes on Shi Yan. He wanted to instigate the experts to kill Shi Yan at any cost.

However, he was just doing extra work.

Because shortly after, the messengers of the four clans fluttered in with news.

“Chief! Big trouble! Our Soul Clan’s homeland was massacred. Several thousand fellows were killed. They were all at Ethereal God Realm, Incipient God Realm, and Immortal Realm!” reported a Soul Clan expert who was shivering.

Hearing him, all the experts standing here discolored in fear. They couldn’t believe what they had just heard.

The Soul Clan, one of the Seven Great Clans, were hunted to the last member right on their ancestral land. Who could be so fierce and brave?

“It’s Shi Yan! He’s transformed into a savage Gian. He used the Devouring power Upanishad to create dozens of black holes and swallow our fellows!” continued the messenger.

Serene Prison, Edgar, and Beverly paled. Yuan Zu was dumbstruck too.

Yuan Zu had hidden for years in this era and covered his identity and motivation. As he had reached Third Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm, he was much stronger than he used to be in the Absolute Beginning Era. However, he didn’t dare to provoke any race among the seven races as he was afraid of creating a situation that he couldn’t handle.

Unexpectedly, Shi Yan had acted unscrupulously. He didn’t care about the consequences or effects he could create. He had slaughtered the Soul Clan.

“Serene Prison, can you stay idle and forgive him as it has gone to this?” Beverly was having fun on the other’s misfortune.

“He has touched the Soul Clan. Maybe the other clans will bear the same disaster,” reminded Yuan Zu. “I think you guys should contact your clan to defend at all cost!”

His words reminded Beverly, Edgar, and Rupert. They didn’t hesitate a lot and immediately prepared to contact their clans.

However, as they were prepping, their subordinates waiting outside screamed and ran to them.

“Chief! Someone attacked our ancestral land! So many of us were killed!”

“Chief! Many... many members of our clan were slaughtered!”

“Shi Yan had slaughtered our territories!”

“...”

The members of the Ancient Monster Clan, Devouring Clan, and Black Demon Clan screamed, shivering and stammering from the news that they just received. Beverly, Edgar, and Rupert were outraged.

They couldn’t exchange information about the Absolute Beginning Gateway anymore. The four profound-realm experts left Empty Land immediately and returned to their ancestral lands at their max speed.

The news about the genocides in the four clans was disclosed. Instantly, the entire universe was exploding. All races were startled.

The Soul Clan, Ancient Monster Clan, Devouring Clan, and Black Demon Clan had been the overlords in this world for tens of thousands of years. And now, their ancestral lands were intruded and their fellows were massacred. It had never happened in their history.

Everybody recognized that this world was about to change drastically.

Shi Yan’s brutal name had spread to each territory so rapidly that no one could stop it. Everybody was scared. The most malicious ones thought that they couldn’t be that sinister and fierce. The warriors of small forces that used to be bullied by those four clans danced and yelled cheerily.

The entire universe was shaken because of Shi Yan’s mad retaliation. Within dozens of thousands of years, the one who was brave enough to provoke the four clans had never appeared.

And now, a God of Slaughter named Shi Yan was crazily killing the members of the four clans. Rumors also said that Neptune and Keith were dead and Shi Yan’s slaughter still continued...

Shi Yan’s title of “God of Slaughter” came to be known in every race and among billions of creatures at the fastest speed.

His brutal name had surpassed the Ten Great Territory Ancestors. He was the bringer of change in this era who could shift the general situation of this era.

—————————————-

A ruin with so many asteroids in a territory belonged to the Mysterious Sky Clan. Zi Yao was moving around and searching for the Absolute Beginning Blood Crystal and the Dark Energy Crystal. After Han Tian, Judy, and Dragon Lizard had taken her here, they waited for her outside.

Including this ruin, they had taken Zi Yao to seven vestiges and ruins. They were all places that the Mysterious Sky Clan had found after dozens of years. They assumed that they were the vestiges from Absolute Beginning Era. Every time they came, Zi Yao would get in there alone and she told them nothing about her harvest.

After a short time, she would get out of the place and ask Han Tian or Judy to take her to another vestige.

This place was one of the two last vestiges that the Mysterious Sky Clan knew. Han Tian and Judy had complicated thoughts as they silently waited for Zi Yao outside.

Suddenly, Judy frowned. A strange crystal was slowly spinning in her Sea of Consciousness.

Soul messages came from the crystal and hovered in Judy’s Sea of Consciousness. At first, Judy didn’t notice them. Shortly after, she got scared out of her wits. She couldn’t help but scream, “Gosh!”

Han Tian and Forefather Dragon Lizard turned to look at her, their countenances puzzled.

After a long time, Judy checked the divine light inside the vestige and took a deep breath, her voice trembling, “You guys can’t imagine what earth-shaking things Shi Yan had done after he bid us farewell!”

“What happened?” Han Tian was surprised.

Judy took a deep breath to stabilize her emotion. “After he left, he went to the ancestral lands of the Soul Clan, Black Demon Clan, Ancient Monster Clan, and Devouring Clan. As Serene Prison, Rupert, Edgar, and Beverly are on Empty Land, he seized the chance to massacre the warriors in their homelands. Those four clans don’t have a Ethereal God Realm, Incipient God Realm, or Immortal Realm in their headquarters anymore!”

As Han Tian and Forefather Dragon Lizard were dumbstruck, Judy bitterly smiled. “It’s our fortune that we came to the Heavenly Eye Clan personally to become Shi Yan and Zi Yao’s alliance. Otherwise, our Mysterious Sky Clan would have become one of his targets! Gosh! He almost killed all the experts the Soul Clan, Black Demon Clan, Devouring clan, and Ancient Monster Clan have nourished for tens of thousands of years.”

When Han Tian and Forefather Dragon Lizard listened to Judy, they felt frozen as if there was a cold air expanding from their hearts to every cell in their bodies.
